task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed ManageEngine ADAudit Plus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web interface is visible in a web browser.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Logon Failures report (Event ID 4625).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ADAudit Plus interface shows a report titled 'Logon Failures' or displays a table of events specifically showing Event ID 4625.

task_completion.description: Verify the report is filtered for the username 'intruder'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A search or filter box contains the word 'intruder', or the report table's 'User Name' column exclusively shows the user 'intruder'.

task_completion.description: Verify the filtered report is exported as a PDF to C:\workspace\intruder_evidence.pdf.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or browser download prompt showing 'intruder_evidence.pdf' being saved in the 'C:\workspace' directory, or a file explorer window showing the PDF file present in C:\workspace.

task_completion.description: Verify a screenshot of the report view is saved to C:\workspace\intruder_report_screen.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot tool (e.g., Snipping Tool) or image editor (e.g., Paint) saving 'intruder_report_screen.png' to 'C:\workspace', or a file explorer window showing the PNG file present in C:\workspace.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the genuine ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the ADAudit Plus UI with its standard menus, styling, and URL, rather than a text editor or mock HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the PDF export was initiated via the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks an 'Export', 'Print', or 'Save as PDF' button within the ADAudit Plus interface or browser, rather than using a terminal command to generate the file.

integrity.description: Verify the screenshot file is a genuine image capture of the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses a screenshot tool or an image editor to save the visual capture, rather than just creating an empty file or renaming a text file to .png via terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target username to filter for is 'intruder'. The expected PDF export path is 'C:\workspace\intruder_evidence.pdf'. The expected screenshot path is 'C:\workspace\intruder_report_screen.png'. The application to use is ManageEngine ADAudit Plus, accessed with the username 'admin'.
